/features.title: Features - Fortune Calendar | Bazi Daily & Monthly, I Ching, AI, Synastry
/features.description: Fortune Calendar features: free Bazi daily & monthly fortune, true solar time, six dimensions, decade trends, AI chat, I Ching, synastry, dream & tarot, date picker and check-in. For entertainment and cultural reference only.

/about.title: About - Fortune Calendar
/about.description: Learn about Fortune Calendar: a modern Bazi-based fortune app with English & Chinese, true solar time, and privacy-friendly local profile storage.

/help.description: FAQ and how-to: birth time setup, true solar time, daily & monthly fortune, AI and I Ching.

/privacy.description: How we handle data: sensitive birth data stays in your browser by default; account and sync explained.
